_metadata.description: Sample character appearances — one per sample character

data.name: Optimus Prime (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Tall, broad-shouldered red and blue robot with iconic silver faceplate.

data.name: Bumblebee (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Small, compact yellow robot with horns on head.

data.name: Devastator (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Giant green and purple combiner formed from six Constructicons.

data.name: Scrapper (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Yellow and purple construction vehicle Decepticon.
